Title: KABDT004 - Device Down: No response from device for last 5 polls
Notes:
Worked on the assigned ticket. Logged into the OPS manager and observed machine KABDT004  has no response from last 5 polls.
Connected to machine from manage engine and upon investigation, found that the SNMP service was stuck. So restart the services
and refreshed the site on OP manager portal. After completing these steps, all sensors resumed normal operation. 
As a result, closing this ticket.

Title: KABRESRIGHT- Interface 'Realtek PCIe GbE Family Controller-Ethernet' is shutdown.
Notes: Worked on the assigned ticket. Logged into the OPS manager and observed machine KABRESRIGHT giving alert Interface 'Realtek PCle Gbe Family Controller- Ethernet' is shutdown. So login into the portal and upon investigation, found that the interface was not in use. Delete the interface, rediscover the interface and added the used one from portal.  After completing these steps, all sensors resumed normal operation. As a result, closing this ticket.

Title: My Remote version 26.1.20.9571 updated on machine KABDT001,KABDT002,KABDT003,KABFDRIGHT

Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine KABDT001,KABDT002,KABDT003,KABFDRIGHT
running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  .
Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 26.1.20.9571. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest
version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket

Title: Failed patches updated on machine VMKABDC1
Notes:
Worked on the ticket. Login to the manage engine portal and checked failed or missing patches patches for the below mentioned machine then download and installed

the failed patches manually which are applicable to the computer. Then scan the machine for installed patches.

After scan Check and verify the machine with the MY RMM portal. It was showing new pending patch for installation. So download and installed that patch. Then again scan the machine for installed patches. The failed patches are updated successfully and machine is in healthy state.

 

Machine : VMKABDC1

Patch installed:

Patch ID Patch Name

356857 Veeam Agent For Windows (13.0.1.1009)

43604 Update for AspNet Core (x64) (8.0.25) (KB5081277)

43606 Update for .NET Desktop Runtime (x64) (8.0.25) (KB5081277)

Title: Initiate upgrade on Veeam version to version 12.
Notes: Logged into the VBR server for KSS and then try to update the license. It was having some issues while trying to upgrade the license. After that verify the Veeam version is running on version 11. Download and run the Veeam update to version 12 and try to fix the issue. The minimum requirement of hardware is not compatible with Veeam version 12 or later. Try to bypass the check and apply few articles and try to fix the issue. But still the issue is same. We need to check this with client to upgrade the hardware to latest version.

Title: Cisco Secure Client Manual Update Required on KABRESRIGHT & KSS-HQ-VBR-01
Notes:
After reviewing the management portal, it has been identified that the following systems require manual updates:

KABRESRIGHT & KSS-HQ-VBR-01

The following components need to be manually uploaded and installed:

  • Cisco Secure Client – AnyConnect VPN (5.1.16.194) – Manual installation required
  • Cisco Secure Client Diagnostics and Reporting Tool (5.1.16.194) – Manual installation required

Remote access will be used to download and install the required setup files on the affected systems. Once the installation is completed, a scan will be initiated through the management portal to verify that the systems reflect the latest version.

Title: Servers went offline.
Notes: Logged into esxi server once the tech has escalated the issue. Go through the esxi and check the error on the VMs.  It was having some storage issue on both the VMs. Troubleshoot the issue and then try to fix the issue. After that turn on the File server for client and brought that up on network. After that try to fix the issue with VBR server which was not working. It has zero space on the disk so it is not able to fix the issue. Need to check with client for upgrade the hardware.
